books.title: The Great Gatsby
books.author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
books.description: A story of the fabulously wealthy Jay Gatsby and his love for the beautiful Daisy Buchanan.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: A dystopian novel set in a totalitarian society ruled by Big Brother.

books.title: A Brief History of Time
books.author: Stephen Hawking
books.description: A landmark volume in science writing that explains cosmology to the general reader.

books.title: The Da Vinci Code
books.author: Dan Brown
books.description: A murder inside the Louvre and clues in Da Vinci paintings lead to the discovery of a religious mystery.

books.title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
books.author: J.K. Rowling
books.description: An orphan boy discovers he is a wizard and begins his education at Hogwarts School.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship with best practices for writing clean, maintainable code.
